creator: jhein@symmetricom.com
text:
Update deskutils/org-mode.el to 7.4 from the really old 4.64 version.

emacs21 users won't be able to use org-mode 7.x, but they can use the
deskutils/org-mode.el6 port.

lots of changes since 4.64:

http://orgmode.org/Changes.html
http://orgmode.org/Changes_old.html

Fix: Here's the update to the port.
 - point to official orgmode.org home now
 - removes pkg-message (org-mode can autoload now).
 - xemacs specific parts no longer needed
 - add installation of some useful contributed software
   that is part of the distribution
